[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 6/18 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Akane (Bunny)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule:
6/18 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 6/25 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
